title: SAP India Capital India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: SAP India Capital India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
SAP India Capital India has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Chandigarh office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About SAP India Capital India:
SAP India Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SAP India Capital India!
